property.name: testRegisterUser
property.value: Verify that a new user can be successfully registered and all user details are persisted correctly in the database

property.name: testLoginUser
property.value: Verify that a registered user can successfully log in and receive a valid authentication token

property.name: testLoginWithWrongUsernameOrPassword
property.value: Verify that login fails with invalid credentials and returns an unauthorized response

property.name: testInstitutionShouldCreateEvent
property.value: Verify that an institution user can create a new event and the event details are stored correctly in the database

property.name: testInstitutionShouldUpdateEvent
property.value: Verify that an institution user can update an existing event and the updated details are correctly persisted

property.name: testInstitutionShouldGetEvents
property.value: Verify that all events associated with a specific institution ID can be retrieved correctly

property.name: testAddResourceToEvent
property.value: Verify that a resource can be successfully added to an event and correctly linked with that event

property.name: testGetProfessionalsList
property.value: Verify that all users with the PROFESSIONAL role can be retrieved successfully

property.name: testAssignProfessionalToEvent
property.value: Verify that a professional user can be successfully assigned to an event and the relationship is persisted

property.name: testProfessionalsShouldViewAssignedEvents
property.value: Verify that a professional user can view all events assigned to them

property.name: testProfessionalsShouldProvideFeedback
property.value: Verify that a professional user can provide feedback for an event and the feedback is stored correctly

property.name: testParticipantShouldGetAllEvents
property.value: Verify that a participant can retrieve the list of all available events

property.name: testParticipantShouldEnrollInEvent
property.value: Verify that a participant can successfully enroll in an event and the enrollment is persisted

property.name: testParticipantShouldViewEventStatus
property.value: Verify that a participant can view the status of a specific event

property.name: testParticipantShouldProvideFeedback
property.value: Verify that a participant can provide feedback for an event and it is stored correctly

property.name: testInstitutionApiShouldBeForbiddenForOtherUser
property.value: Verify that users without INSTITUTION role are forbidden from accessing institution-specific APIs

property.name: testProfessionalsApiShouldBeForbiddenForOtherUser
property.value: Verify that users without PROFESSIONAL role are forbidden from accessing professional-specific APIs

property.name: testParticipantApiShouldBeForbiddenForOtherUser
property.value: Verify that users without PARTICIPANT role are forbidden from accessing participant-specific APIs

property.name: testAddResourceFormInitialization
property.value: Verify that the Add Resource form initializes with empty values and all required validators are applied

property.name: testAddResourceFormValid
property.value: Verify that the Add Resource form becomes valid when all required fields are filled correctly

property.name: testAssignProfessionalFormInitialization
property.value: Verify that the Assign Professional form initializes with required fields and validation rules

property.name: testAssignProfessionalFormValid
property.value: Verify that the Assign Professional form becomes valid when event ID and user ID are provided

property.name: testCreateEventFormInitialization
property.value: Verify that the Create Event form initializes with empty values and required validators

property.name: testCreateEventFormValid
property.value: Verify that the Create Event form becomes valid when all mandatory fields are filled correctly

property.name: testLoginFormInvalidWhenEmpty
property.value: Verify that the login form is invalid when both username and password fields are empty

property.name: testLoginFormInvalidWhenPartial
property.value: Verify that the login form is invalid when either username or password is missing

property.name: testLoginFormValid
property.value: Verify that the login form becomes valid when both username and password are provided

property.name: testRegistrationFormInvalidWhenEmpty
property.value: Verify that the registration form is invalid when all required fields are empty

property.name: testRegistrationFormInvalidEmail
property.value: Verify that the registration form is invalid when the email format is incorrect

property.name: testRegistrationFormValid
property.value: Verify that the registration form becomes valid when all fields are correctly filled

property.name: testHttpServiceCreation
property.value: Verify that the HTTP service is successfully instantiated

property.name: testGetEventByProfessional
property.value: Verify that events are fetched correctly for a professional user using API

property.name: testGetEventByInstitutionId
property.value: Verify that events are fetched correctly for a given institution ID using API

property.name: testGetAllProfessionals
property.value: Verify that all professionals are retrieved correctly using API

property.name: testGetAllEventsFinance
property.value: Verify that all events are fetched from finance API endpoint correctly

property.name: testViewAllEventsParticipant
property.value: Verify that participants can retrieve all available events using API

property.name: testViewEventStatus
property.value: Verify that event status is retrieved correctly for a given event ID

property.name: testEnrollParticipant
property.value: Verify that a participant can successfully enroll in an event using API

property.name: testCreateEventApi
property.value: Verify that an event is successfully created using API call

property.name: testUpdateEventApi
property.value: Verify that an event is successfully updated using API call

property.name: testAddResourceApi
property.value: Verify that a resource is successfully added to an event using API

property.name: testAssignProfessionalsApi
property.value: Verify that a professional is successfully assigned to an event using API

property.name: testUpdateEventStatus
property.value: Verify that event status is successfully updated using API

property.name: testAddFeedbackApi
property.value: Verify that feedback is successfully submitted for an event using API
